children.name: Haematopus
children.description: Noisy pied waders of rocky shores. The bright orange bill is used to prise open mussels or stab open cockles — each individual learns one technique and uses it for life. Their loud piping calls are a defining sound of the Swedish archipelago coastline.

children.name: Haematopus ostralegus
children.description: A boldly pied wader with a long orange bill and loud piping calls, a defining bird of the Swedish archipelago. Each individual specialises for life in either hammering or prising open shellfish.
